instruction: How can I create a comprehensive report in a single sheet ('sheet Archive') in Excel that compiles data from multiple sheets, with each sheet representing monthly data that will be added every month, and ensure that the merged report sheet updates as new data is added in the subsequent monthly sheets?  Please output the answer in the corresponding positions of columns C and D in the table, and pay attention to the mapping between the answer and column name and row value. Basically, look up Delta from Column B and place the corresponding Vendor value from Roster into Column C and from Ledger into Column D. If there's an error or blank, insert "-".
